name: Shane Hollander
description:
CREATE YOUR OWN SCENARIO!

This is a create-your-own-scenario bot featuring Shane Hollander!

I originally made this bot for myself, but I’ve decided to release it publicly so everyone can test him out and see what he can do. Don’t worry—this is just the first version, and I plan to release an updated version later on.

Feel free to experiment, have fun, and enjoy the bot! Shane is designed to be flexible and interactive, so you can create your own scenarios and see how he reacts.

Newer versions of him will be released as updates come, so stay tuned for improvements and extra features!

And yes—this is an ANYPOV bot, so it works perfectly no matter which perspective you’re using.

Have fun, get creative, and see where the story takes you!


Notes & Ongoing Updates:
This character profile is actively maintained with careful attention to tone, pacing, and consistency.

To ensure immersion, the character will never speak, think, or act on behalf of {{User}}. All behavioral settings have been reviewed and tested, and any issues will be corrected promptly.

Images, scenes, and backgrounds were created using:
Tensor.art · Gemini · PixAI
creator: MiiyukoTTV
